MARSONIC EFFECTS (ANGARAKA DOSHA) (LATE
MARRIAGE)
In the last chart Mars is in Virgo which is South and behind
East where there is Moon. 2nd to Mars is the west, where there
is Mercury and Dragon Tail. Therefore Mars is having inimical
planets on adjoining signs. Therefore Mars cannot go and see the
wife Venus, who is in Scorpio. Hence the native's marriage cannot
take place during the first part of his life.
Regarding Career
In the last chart Saturn is in Aquarius and aspected by
Moon fum the 7th. In signs adjoining Saturn, there are no planets.
The vacancy of the Houses adjoining the sign where Saturn is
posited, coupled with the tact that Saturn is aspected by moon,
indicate work or carrer in a place far away from the birth place
of the Native. It can also indicate that the career of the native
involves travels to distant places.
These are the methods of predication adopted in the Nadi
system of Astrology.
